proposal.working_title: AI Labs Explained: The Six Operating Metrics That Separate a Cost Center From a Compounding Asset
proposal.one_line_angle: Most mid-market AI labs measure progress in projects shipped and tools tested, when the leverage signal that decides whether the lab compounds or stalls lives in six operating metrics, from per-workflow payback to model-replacement velocity.
outline_bullets: Why output metrics (pilots shipped, tools tested) miss the leverage signal that decides whether an AI lab compounds or quietly stalls
The six operating metrics every mid-market AI lab should track in 2026 and the threshold each must cross to count as healthy
A 30-day audit checklist to wire those six metrics into the AI lab review your CFO and COO will both sign off on
